---
title: "Datadog 4XX Error Analysis"
subtitle: "4XX error patterns by subdomain — identifying problematic integrations and workflows"
date: today
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: left
    theme: cosmo
    page-layout: full
    grid:
      body-width: 1800px
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
@media (min-width: 1200px) {
  #quarto-content.page-columns {
    display: grid !important;
    grid-template-columns: 250px 1fr !important;
    gap: 2em !important;
  }
  #quarto-sidebar {
    grid-column: 1 !important;
    position: sticky !important;
    top: 1rem !important;
    height: fit-content !important;
  }
  #quarto-document-content {
    grid-column: 2 !important;
    max-width: 100% !important;
  }
}
@media (min-width: 768px) and (max-width: 1199px) {
  #quarto-content.page-columns { display: block !important; }
  #quarto-sidebar {
    position: relative !important;
    width: 100% !important;
    margin-bottom: 2rem !important;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd !important;
    padding-bottom: 1rem !important;
  }
  #quarto-sidebar nav {
    display: flex !important;
    flex-wrap: wrap !important;
    gap: 0.5rem 1.5rem !important;
  }
  #quarto-sidebar nav ul {
    display: flex !important;
    flex-wrap: wrap !important;
    gap: 0.25rem 1.5rem !important;
    padding-left: 0 !important;
    list-style: none !important;
  }
  #quarto-document-content { max-width: 100% !important; }
}
@media (max-width: 767px) {
  #quarto-sidebar { display: none !important; }
  #quarto-document-content { max-width: 100% !important; }
}
.column-body { max-width: 100% !important; }
div.cell-output-display { width: 100% !important; }

.filter-row {
  display: flex !important;
  flex-wrap: wrap !important;
  gap: 1rem !important;
  align-items: flex-end !important;
  margin-bottom: 1rem !important;
}
.filter-row > div {
  flex: 0 0 auto !important;
  min-width: 100px !important;
}
.filter-row form { margin: 0 !important; }
</style>
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

summary = FileAttachment("data/agg_summary.csv").csv({typed: true})
urls = FileAttachment("data/agg_urls.csv").csv({typed: true})
methods = FileAttachment("data/agg_methods.csv").csv({typed: true})
```

## Executive Summary

Analysis of 4XX HTTP errors across customer subdomains to identify broken integrations, permission failures, and rate-limiting hotspots.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

totalErrors = d3.sum(summary, d => d.count)
subdomains = [...new Set(summary.map(d => d.subdomain))]

md`
| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| **Total 4XX errors (2 days)** | ${totalErrors.toLocaleString()} |
| **Subdomains analyzed** | ${subdomains.join(", ")} |`
```

**Download data:** [Summary (CSV)](data/agg_summary.csv) | [URLs (CSV)](data/agg_urls.csv) | [Methods (CSV)](data/agg_methods.csv)


## Errors by Status Code

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

viewof selectedSubdomain = Inputs.select(["All", ...subdomains], {label: "Subdomain", value: "All"})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

filtered = selectedSubdomain === "All" ? summary : summary.filter(d => d.subdomain === selectedSubdomain)

// Aggregate by status code across selected subdomains
statusAgg = Array.from(
  d3.rollup(filtered, v => d3.sum(v, d => d.count), d => d.status_code),
  ([status_code, count]) => ({status_code: String(status_code), count})
)

Plot.plot({
  height: 350,
  marginLeft: 60,
  marginRight: 80,
  x: {label: "Error Count"},
  y: {label: "Status Code"},
  marks: [
    Plot.barX(statusAgg, {
      y: "status_code",
      x: "count",
      fill: "status_code",
      sort: {y: "-x"}
    }),
    Plot.text(statusAgg, {
      y: "status_code",
      x: "count",
      text: d => d.count.toLocaleString(),
      dx: 5,
      textAnchor: "start"
    }),
    Plot.ruleX([0])
  ]
})
```


## Errors by Subdomain

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

subdomainAgg = Array.from(
  d3.rollup(summary, v => d3.sum(v, d => d.count), d => d.subdomain),
  ([subdomain, count]) => ({subdomain, count})
)

Plot.plot({
  height: 250,
  marginLeft: 120,
  marginRight: 80,
  x: {label: "Error Count"},
  y: {label: null},
  marks: [
    Plot.barX(subdomainAgg, {
      y: "subdomain",
      x: "count",
      fill: "subdomain",
      sort: {y: "-x"}
    }),
    Plot.text(subdomainAgg, {
      y: "subdomain",
      x: "count",
      text: d => d.count.toLocaleString(),
      dx: 5,
      textAnchor: "start"
    }),
    Plot.ruleX([0])
  ]
})
```


## Errors by HTTP Method

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

filteredMethods = selectedSubdomain === "All" ? methods : methods.filter(d => d.subdomain === selectedSubdomain)

methodAgg = Array.from(
  d3.rollup(filteredMethods, v => d3.sum(v, d => d.count), d => d.method),
  ([method, count]) => ({method, count})
)

Plot.plot({
  height: 250,
  marginLeft: 80,
  marginRight: 80,
  x: {label: "Error Count"},
  y: {label: null},
  marks: [
    Plot.barX(methodAgg, {
      y: "method",
      x: "count",
      fill: "method",
      sort: {y: "-x"}
    }),
    Plot.text(methodAgg, {
      y: "method",
      x: "count",
      text: d => d.count.toLocaleString(),
      dx: 5,
      textAnchor: "start"
    }),
    Plot.ruleX([0])
  ]
})
```


## Top Failing Endpoints

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

filteredUrls = selectedSubdomain === "All" ? urls : urls.filter(d => d.subdomain === selectedSubdomain)
topUrls = filteredUrls.sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count).slice(0, 25)

// Shorten URLs for display
shortenUrl = (url) => {
  try {
    const u = new URL(url)
    return u.pathname
  } catch {
    return url.length > 80 ? url.slice(0, 77) + "..." : url
  }
}

Plot.plot({
  height: Math.max(400, topUrls.length * 28),
  marginLeft: 400,
  marginRight: 80,
  x: {label: "Error Count"},
  y: {label: null},
  marks: [
    Plot.barX(topUrls, {
      y: d => shortenUrl(d.url),
      x: "count",
      fill: "subdomain",
      sort: {y: "-x"}
    }),
    Plot.text(topUrls, {
      y: d => shortenUrl(d.url),
      x: "count",
      text: d => d.count.toLocaleString(),
      dx: 5,
      textAnchor: "start"
    }),
    Plot.ruleX([0])
  ]
})
```


## Detail Tables

### Status Codes

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

Inputs.table(summary, {
  sort: "count",
  reverse: true,
  rows: 25
})
```

### Top URLs

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

Inputs.table(filteredUrls, {
  sort: "count",
  reverse: true,
  rows: 30
})
```


## Methodology

### Data Sources

| Source | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| Datadog Logs | `pup logs aggregate` — 4XX error counts by status code, URL, and HTTP method per subdomain |

### Limitations

1. Data covers a 2-day rolling window; long-term trends require repeated collection
2. URL grouping is limited to top 50 endpoints per subdomain per query
3. Log message details require individual log searches (not captured in aggregations)
